subject: A naga shaman with serpentine lower body coiled upright, raising clawed hands as she peers into a glowing green orb of divinatory light
description: A naga shaman rises from coiled serpent coils, her humanoid torso lean and bare-armed, scaled skin tinted greenish-bronze. She wears minimal ornament — a beaded headpiece and dark wraps — and her clawed hands cradle the air around a luminous green sphere of conjured light that hovers before her. Tendrils of mystic energy or dark vapor curl up from the orb. The background is a smoky, swampy gloom in deep teals and bruised greens, suggesting a humid jungle or fetid temple interior. Light radiates from the orb itself, casting rim-light along the naga's scales and arms while leaving the surroundings shadowed. The mood is quiet, predatory, occult.
foreground: naga shaman cradling a glowing green orb of divination
background: smoky swamp gloom with vague jungle silhouettes
